semantic.role: LLM prompt template for generating structured JSON architecture diagram specifications from project and folder summaries.
responsibilities: Defines the JSON schema structure for architecture diagram specifications
Constructs LLM prompt instructions for generating architecture diagrams
Formats project and folder summary context for diagram generation
Enforces constraints on node types, edge references, and summary card structure
outOfScope: Executing LLM calls or managing AI model interactions
Storing or persisting generated diagram specifications
invariants: Output must be strict JSON without Markdown, HTML, SVG, or code fences
Node types are restricted to: frontend, backend, database, cloud, security, messagebus, external
Every edge must reference an existing node id
Exactly three summaryCards with headings: Core Modules, Key Dependencies, System Boundaries

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Provide a deterministic template for generating architecture view assets (diagram specs) from structured project data.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: Add deterministic rendering assets for view generation (aligned with commit 'feat(view): add deterministic rendering assets').
